overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest trail at dusk with a torch. The character navigates a winding dirt path beside a river under dark stormy skies, passing through dense woodland with atmospheric lighting.

events.description: character completes left turn and begins walking straight along the dirt path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks with torch held high, illuminating the path ahead while turning left to follow the trail beside the river

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and rocks
calm water body running parallel to the trail on the left side
thick woodland with tall trees silhouetted against the stormy sky
clusters of yellow-orange foliage indicating autumn season

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a forest trail at dusk, torch casting warm light on the dirt path. The character turns left to follow the winding trail that runs alongside a river, surrounded by dense woodland and autumn-colored bushes under dark overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest path with tall grass

agents.ego_description: continues walking steadily along the dirt trail, torch casting dynamic shadows on the tall grass and vegetation

segments.scene_description: Geralt proceeds along the forest trail in a straight path, the torch illuminating the dirt ground and surrounding tall grass. The river remains visible to the left while the dense forest continues in the background, maintaining the atmospheric dusk setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching wooden debris field

events.description: wooden debris and fallen structures become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: approaches a large tree trunk on the right while continuing toward the debris field ahead

entered.detail: thick tree trunk with exposed roots beside the path
fallen wooden beams and debris scattered across the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt approaching a large tree trunk on the right side of the path. As he continues forward, wooden debris and fallen structures become visible in the distance, suggesting a blocked path or abandoned site ahead, while the torchlight reveals the details of the approaching obstacle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding forest trail at dusk that leads from a riverside path toward a site of wooden ruins. It begins with Geralt turning left to follow a dirt trail flanked by autumn-colored bushes and a river under dark, overcast skies, his torch casting a warm glow on the ground. As he proceeds, the path straightens and the camera tracks forward through tall grass, keeping the river in view while the dense woodland looms in the background. The scene then shifts as Geralt approaches a large tree trunk on the right, with the torchlight gradually revealing wooden debris and fallen structures ahead. Finally, the movement culminates as the character nears these abandoned remains, suggesting a blocked path at the end of the trail.
